testcase.name: test_02_admin_can_list_all_roles

failure.message: AssertionError: Role Administrador should have level field assert 'level' in {'code': 'admin', 'id': 'd683744c-9288-4233-a742-c16a29ea2b98', 'is_system': True, 'name': 'Administrador'}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_hierarchical_security.py:252: in test_02_admin_can_list_all_roles assert "level" in role, f"Role {role.get('name')} should have level field" E AssertionError: Role Administrador should have level field E assert 'level' in {'code': 'admin', 'id': 'd683744c-9288-4233-a742-c16a29ea2b98', 'is_system': True, 'name': 'Administrador'}

testcase.name: test_02_carlos_sees_filtered_roles

failure.message: AssertionError: Carlos should NOT see admin role (level 100) assert 'admin' not in ['kitchen', 'admin', 'waiter', 'cashier', 'kitchen', 'supervisor_test', ...]

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_hierarchical_security.py:358: in test_02_carlos_sees_filtered_roles assert "admin" not in role_codes, "Carlos should NOT see admin role (level 100)" E AssertionError: Carlos should NOT see admin role (level 100) E assert 'admin' not in ['kitchen', 'admin', 'waiter', 'cashier', 'kitchen', 'supervisor_test', ...]
